summary: Fan out readers across the entire Pulse Node.js backend to produce a precise structured spec for the C++ port
logs: parallel[6] failed: agent({schema}): subagent completed without calling StructuredOutput (after 2 in-conversation nudges)

specs.overview: This subsystem contains 23 Mongoose schema definitions modeling the complete Pulse social media platform. Models implement user authentication, content management (posts, reels, snaps, stories), engagement tracking (likes, comments, follows), messaging, notifications, gamification (PulseScore, SocialDNA), advanced features (AlterEgo AI, Roulette matching, WhisperMap), and behavioral analytics (UserBehavior for personalization). All schemas use MongoDB with indexing strategies for O(1) lookups and efficient queries. Models employ denormalization patterns (stats counters, engagement caches), virtual references, pre/post hooks, and static methods for atomic database operations. The design prioritizes scalability (no embedded arrays beyond ~10K items, dedicated collections for high-volume relationships like Follow and Like), and includes TTL indexes for auto-cleanup (OTP, Session, Snap, Whisper).

files.purpose: User account and profile schema; foundation for authentication, identity, social relationships, preferences, and privacy settings.
files.schema:
FIELDS:
  username (String): unique, sparse, lowercase, 3-20 chars, /^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$/
  name (String): required, max 50 chars
  email (String): sparse, unique, lowercase, email format
  phone (String): sparse, unique
  passwordHash (String): select=false (never returned unless explicitly +passwordHash)
  authMethods (Array): { type: enum[email|phone|google|facebook], identifier, verified, verifiedAt }
  profile (Object): displayName (str, 50 max), bio (str, 150 max), avatar (str), coverPhoto (str, default), website (str, 100 max), location (str, 100 max), dateOfBirth (Date), gender (enum[male|female|non-binary|prefer-not-to-say])
  role (enum[user|admin|moderator]): default user
  isActive (Boolean): default true
  isVerified (Boolean): default false
  isOnline (Boolean): default false
  lastActive (Date): default Date.now
  stats (Object): posts (Number, default 0), followers (Number, default 0), following (Number, default 0), likes (Number, default 0)
  followers (Array[ObjectId]): DEPRECATED—use Follow collection; select=false
  following (Array[ObjectId]): DEPRECATED—use Follow collection; select=false
  blockedUsers (Array[ObjectId]): ref User
  lastLocation (GeoJSON Point): default [0,0]; coordinates [longitude, latitude], address (str)
  privacy (Object): isPrivate (bool), showEmail (bool), showPhone (bool), showLocation (bool, default true), showOnlineStatus (bool, default true), allowMessages (enum[everyone|followers|none], default everyone), allowTagging (bool, default true)
  settings (Object): radius (Number, 100-50000 default 1000), shareExactLocation (bool), anonymousPosting (bool), pushNotifications (bool, default true), emailNotifications (bool, default true), notifyOnFollow (bool, default true), notifyOnLike (bool, default true), notifyOnComment (bool, default true), notifyOnMention (bool, default true), theme (enum[light|dark|auto], default auto), language (String, default en)
  twoFactorSecret (String): select=false
  twoFactorEnabled (Boolean): default false
  lastLoginAt (Date)
  loginAttempts (Number): default 0
  lockUntil (Date): account locked until timestamp
  badges (Array): { type: enum[verified|early-adopter|contributor|moderator], earnedAt }
  fcmTokens (Array): { token (str, required), deviceId (str, required), platform (enum[android|ios], default android), lastUsed (Date) }
  lastPostAt (Date)
  lastCommentAt (Date)
  referralCode (String): unique, sparse, uppercase
  referredBy (ObjectId): ref User
  referralCount (Number): default 0
  onboarding (Object): topics (Array[String]), vibes (Array[String]), completedAt (Date)
  timestamps: true
  collection: users

INDEXES:
  { username: 1 }: unique, sparse
  { email: 1 }: unique, sparse
  { phone: 1 }: unique, sparse
  { authMethods.type: 1, authMethods.identifier: 1 }
  { profile.displayName: text, username: text, profile.bio: text }
  { isActive: 1, isVerified: 1 }
  { stats.followers: -1 }
  { lastLocation: 2dsphere }
  { lastActive: -1 }
  { createdAt: -1 }
  { referralCode: 1 }: unique, sparse

VIRTUALS:
  followerCount: get() => stats.followers || 0
  followingCount: get() => stats.following || 0
  age: get() => calculates from profile.dateOfBirth (years)

INSTANCE METHODS:
  isAccountLocked() => boolean: lockUntil && lockUntil > Date.now()
  incrementLoginAttempts() => Promise: increments loginAttempts, locks if >= 5
  resetLoginAttempts() => Promise: clears loginAttempts and lockUntil
  updateLastActive() => Promise: sets lastActive = now, saves
  setOnlineStatus(isOnline: bool) => Promise: sets isOnline, updates lastActive if true
  canViewProfile(viewerId: ObjectId) => boolean: returns !isPrivate || self || (follower check)
  isFollowing(userId: ObjectId) => boolean: checks deprecated following array (use Follow collection instead)
  isFollower(userId: ObjectId) => boolean: checks deprecated followers array (use Follow collection instead)
  isBlocked(userId: ObjectId) => boolean: checks blockedUsers array

STATIC METHODS:
  findByAuthMethod(type: string, identifier: string) => Promise[User | null]: finds user by auth method (email, phone, google, facebook); handles phone normalization
  findByCredentials(identifier: string, password: string) => Promise[User | null]: +passwordHash selection
  searchUsers(searchTerm: string, limit: number=20) => Query[User[]]: regex search on username and displayName, returns 20 by default
  getTrendingUsers(limit: number=10) => Query[User[]]: sorted by followers desc, lastActive desc
  getSuggestedUsers(userId: ObjectId, limit: number=10) => Promise[User[]]: excludes self and already-followed users (resolved from Follow collection), returns top by followers

PRE-SAVE HOOK:
  - Sets profile.displayName to username if not set

TO_JSON TRANSFORM:
  - Excludes passwordHash, loginAttempts, lockUntil, __v
  - Includes virtuals (age, followerCount, followingCount)

files.purpose: One-Time Password for authentication flows (signup, login, password reset, 2FA, verification).
files.schema:
FIELDS:
  userId (ObjectId): ref User, default null
  identifier (String): required, trimmed (email or phone)
  type (enum[email|sms]): required
  purpose (enum[signup|login|password_reset|2fa|verification]): required
  hashedCode (String): required (hashed OTP code, never plaintext)
  attempts (Number): default 0
  maxAttempts (Number): default 3
  verified (Boolean): default false
  verifiedAt (Date): default null
  ipAddress (String): required (for security logging)
  userAgent (String): default empty
  expiresAt (Date): required; expires: 0 (MongoDB TTL auto-delete)
  timestamps: true
  collection: otps

INDEXES:
  { identifier: 1, purpose: 1, verified: 1 }
  { userId: 1 }
  { createdAt: 1 }: expireAfterSeconds: 1800 (30 min max lifetime)

INSTANCE METHODS:
  incrementAttempts() => Promise: increments attempts, saves
  markAsVerified() => Promise: sets verified=true, verifiedAt=now, saves
  isExpired() => boolean: expiresAt < Date.now()
  isMaxAttemptsReached() => boolean: attempts >= maxAttempts

STATIC METHODS:
  findValidOTP(identifier: string, purpose: string) => Query[OTP | null]: finds by identifier+purpose, verified=false, expiresAt > now, sorts by createdAt desc (most recent)
  cleanupExpired() => Promise[{ deletedCount }]: deletes all expiresAt < now

files.purpose: Multi-device session tracking; stores refresh tokens, device info, and geolocation per login.
files.schema:
FIELDS:
  userId (ObjectId): ref User, required
  deviceId (String): required, unique per device
  deviceInfo (Object): platform (enum[ios|android|web|desktop], required), deviceName (str, default Unknown Device), appVersion (str, default 1.0.0), osVersion (str, default Unknown)
  accessToken (String): required, select=false
  refreshToken (String): required, select=false
  firebaseToken (String): default null, select=false
  ipAddress (String): required
  userAgent (String): default empty
  location (Object): city (str), country (str), coordinates ([Number], default null) [lng, lat]
  isActive (Boolean): default true
  lastActivity (Date): default Date.now
  expiresAt (Date): required; expires: 0 (TTL auto-delete)
  timestamps: true
  collection: sessions

INDEXES:
  { userId: 1, isActive: 1 }
  { deviceId: 1 }
  { refreshToken: 1 }
  { lastActivity: -1 }

INSTANCE METHODS:
  updateActivity() => Promise: sets lastActivity = now, saves
  deactivate() => Promise: sets isActive = false, saves
  isExpired() => boolean: expiresAt < Date.now()

STATIC METHODS:
  findActiveSession(userId: ObjectId, deviceId: string) => Query[Session | null]: finds by userId+deviceId, isActive=true, expiresAt > now
  deactivateUserSessions(userId: ObjectId, excludeDeviceId?: string) => Promise[{ modifiedCount }]: updateMany with isActive=false, optionally excludes one device
  cleanupExpired() => Promise[{ deletedCount }]: deletes expiresAt < now OR (isActive=false AND updatedAt < 7 days ago)

files.purpose: User posts with rich media, engagement stats, visibility settings, embedding for recommendations, and trending/search support.
files.schema:
FIELDS:
  author (ObjectId): ref User, required, indexed
  content (Object): text (str, 2000 max), media (Array[{ type: enum[image|video|gif], url (str), thumbnail (str), width (num), height (num), duration (num), size (num) }]), hashtags (Array[str], lowercase+trimmed), mentions (Array[ObjectId] ref User)
  location (GeoJSON): type: Point (default), coordinates: [lng, lat], address (str), placeName (str)
  likes (Array[ObjectId]): DEPRECATED—use Like collection; ref User
  stats (Object): likes (Number, default 0), comments (Number, default 0), shares (Number, default 0), views (Number, default 0)
  visibility (enum[public|followers|private]): default public
  allowComments (Boolean): default true
  isAnonymous (Boolean): default false
  isActive (Boolean): default true
  isEdited (Boolean): default false
  editedAt (Date)
  isPinned (Boolean): default false
  isReported (Boolean): default false
  reportCount (Number): default 0
  originalPost (ObjectId): ref Post (for reposts)
  isRepost (Boolean): default false
  vibe (enum[chill|hype|sad|funny|creative|general]): default general, indexed
  vibeScore (Object): chill (Number, default 0), hype (Number, default 0), sad (Number, default 0), funny (Number, default 0), creative (Number, default 0)
  embedding (Array[Number]): fixed-dimension feature vector for recommendation retrieval; select=false; L2-normalized
  embeddingVersion (Number): default 0, select=false
  timestamps: true
  toJSON/toObject: virtuals=true

INDEXES:
  { author: 1, createdAt: -1 }
  { author: 1, isActive: 1, createdAt: -1 }
  { isActive: 1, visibility: 1, createdAt: -1 }
  { content.hashtags: 1 }
  { isActive: 1, visibility: 1, createdAt: -1, stats.likes: -1 }
  { location: 2dsphere }
  { createdAt: -1 }
  { content.text: text, content.hashtags: text }: weights={hashtags:5, text:1}; name=post_text_search

INSTANCE METHODS:
  isLikedBy(userId: ObjectId) => boolean: checks deprecated likes array (use Like.isLikedBy)

STATIC METHODS:
  getHomeFeed(userId: ObjectId, followingIds: Array[ObjectId], options?: {limit?: 20, lastPostDate?: Date}) => Query[Post[]]: isActive=true, author in [userId, ...followingIds], visibility in [public, followers], createdAt pagination, sorted desc, populated author with profile
  getGlobalFeed(options?: {limit?: 20, lastPostDate?: Date}) => Query[Post[]]: isActive=true, visibility=public, pagination, sorted createdAt desc, populated author
  getTrendingPosts(options?: {limit?: 20, timeRange?: 24 hours}) => Query[Post[]]: isActive=true, visibility=public, createdAt >= timeRange, sorted by likes desc then comments desc, populated author
  getNearbyPosts(coordinates: [lng, lat], maxDistance?: 1000 meters, options?: {limit?: 20}) => Query[Post[]]: $near geospatial, populated author

PRE-SAVE HOOK:
  - If likes modified: sync stats.likes = likes.length
  - If content.text modified: extract hashtags via /#[\w]+/g regex, store lowercase in content.hashtags
  - On new or content/hashtags/media/vibe modified: compute embedding vector via embeddingService.featureVector(); sets embeddingVersion=1; non-blocking (best-effort, retrieval degrades to recency if absent)

files.purpose: Comments on posts with nested reply support, mentions, GIF support, and like tracking.
files.schema:
FIELDS:
  post (ObjectId): ref Post, required, indexed
  author (ObjectId): ref User, required
  content (String): 500 max, trimmed; required=false (contradictory—see note)
  mentions (Array[ObjectId]): ref User
  likes (Array[ObjectId]): ref User
  gif (Object): id (str), url (str), preview (str), width (num), height (num), description (str)
  parentComment (ObjectId): ref Comment, default null (null means top-level comment)
  replies (Array[ObjectId]): ref Comment (IDs of child comments)
  isEdited (Boolean): default false
  editedAt (Date)
  isActive (Boolean): default true
  timestamps: true

INDEXES:
  { post: 1, createdAt: -1 }
  { author: 1, createdAt: -1 }
  { parentComment: 1 }

NOTE: content field has conflicting definitions (required=true then required=false); implementation should treat as required.

files.purpose: Production-grade like tracking (posts, reels, comments); replaces embedded arrays with O(1) atomic operations.
files.schema:
FIELDS:
  user (ObjectId): ref User, required, indexed
  targetType (enum[post|reel|comment]): required
  targetId (ObjectId): required; refPath: targetTypeModel
  targetTypeModel (enum[Post|Reel|Comment|ReelComment]): required
  timestamps: true

INDEXES:
  { user: 1, targetType: 1, targetId: 1 }: unique
  { targetType: 1, targetId: 1, user: 1 }
  { targetType: 1, targetId: 1, createdAt: -1 }
  { targetType: 1, targetId: 1, createdAt: 1 }
  { user: 1, createdAt: -1 }

STATIC METHODS:
  toggleLike(userId: ObjectId, targetType: string, targetId: ObjectId) => Promise[{liked: bool, likeCount: number}]: atomic delete-first toggle; if deleted returns unlike with count; else creates (ignoring E11000 duplicates from concurrent requests), returns like with count
  isLikedBy(userId: ObjectId, targetType: string, targetId: ObjectId) => Promise[bool]: countDocuments query
  getLikedIds(userId: ObjectId, targetType: string, targetIds: Array[ObjectId]) => Promise[Set[string]]: bulk check for feed rendering
  getLikeCount(targetType: string, targetId: ObjectId) => Promise[number]: countDocuments
  getLikeVelocity(targetType: string, targetId: ObjectId, hoursWindow?: 1) => Promise[number]: likes per hour in time window
  getBatchLikeVelocities(targetType: string, targetIds: Array[ObjectId], hoursWindow?: 1) => Promise[Map[string, number]]: aggregation pipeline for whole feed
  getBatchLikeCounts(targetType: string, targetIds: Array[ObjectId]) => Promise[Map[string, number]]: aggregation with $group for feed optimization

files.purpose: Short-form video content with stats, trending metrics, and hashtag support.
files.schema:
FIELDS:
  user (ObjectId): ref User, required, indexed
  videoUrl (String): required
  publicId (String): required (Cloudinary public ID)
  caption (String): 2200 max
  likes (Array[ObjectId]): DEPRECATED—use Like collection; ref User
  commentsCount (Number): default 0
  stats (Object): likes (Number, default 0), comments (Number, default 0), shares (Number, default 0), views (Number, default 0), saves (Number, default 0), avgWatchPercentage (Number, default 0)
  duration (Number): seconds, default 0
  hashtags (Array[str]): lowercase, trimmed
  music (String): default null (music attribution)
  timestamps: true
  toJSON/toObject: virtuals=true

INDEXES:
  { user: 1, createdAt: -1 }
  { createdAt: -1 }
  { stats.likes: -1, createdAt: -1 }
  { stats.views: -1 }
  { hashtags: 1 }

files.purpose: Comments on reels with nesting via virtual replies.
files.schema:
FIELDS:
  reel (ObjectId): ref Reel, required
  author (ObjectId): ref User, required
  content (String): required, trimmed
  parentComment (ObjectId): ref ReelComment, default null
  likes (Array[ObjectId]): ref User
  timestamps: true
  toJSON/toObject: virtuals=true

VIRTUALS:
  replies: ref ReelComment, localField=_id, foreignField=parentComment (auto-populates child comments)

files.purpose: Dedicated follow relationship collection (replaces arrays in User for scalability; O(1) follow/unfollow, no 16MB doc limit).
files.schema:
FIELDS:
  follower (ObjectId): ref User, required, indexed
  following (ObjectId): ref User, required, indexed
  timestamps: true

INDEXES:
  { follower: 1, following: 1 }: unique (prevents duplicate follows)
  { following: 1, createdAt: -1 }
  { follower: 1, createdAt: -1 }

STATIC METHODS:
  toggleFollow(followerId: ObjectId, followingId: ObjectId) => Promise[{followed: bool, followerCount: number, followingCount: number}]: atomic delete-first toggle; if deleted returns unfollowed state with counts; else creates (ignores E11000 from concurrent), returns followed state with counts
  isFollowing(followerId: ObjectId, followingId: ObjectId) => Promise[bool]: existence check
  getFollowerCount(userId: ObjectId) => Promise[number]: countDocuments where following=userId
  getFollowingCount(userId: ObjectId) => Promise[number]: countDocuments where follower=userId
  getFollowerIds(userId: ObjectId) => Promise[Array[ObjectId]]: returns follower IDs for a user
  getFollowingIds(userId: ObjectId) => Promise[Array[ObjectId]]: returns following IDs for a user

files.purpose: Bookmark (save) posts and reels for later viewing.
files.schema:
FIELDS:
  user (ObjectId): ref User, required, indexed
  itemId (ObjectId): required (ID of post or reel)
  itemType (enum[post|reel]): required
  timestamps: true

INDEXES:
  { user: 1, itemId: 1, itemType: 1 }: unique (one bookmark per item per user)
  { user: 1, itemType: 1, createdAt: -1 }

files.purpose: In-app and push notifications for user interactions (likes, comments, follows, mentions, messages, etc.).
files.schema:
FIELDS:
  recipient (ObjectId): ref User, required, indexed
  sender (ObjectId): ref User, required
  type (enum[like|comment|follow|chat|whisper|mention|reel_like|reel_comment]): required
  post (ObjectId): ref Post (optional, for post-related notifications)
  reel (ObjectId): ref Reel (optional)
  whisper (ObjectId): ref Whisper (optional)
  conversation (ObjectId): ref Conversation (optional)
  comment (ObjectId): ref Comment (optional)
  message (String): 200 max (custom display text)
  isRead (Boolean): default false, indexed
  timestamps: true
  collection: notifications

INDEXES:
  { recipient: 1, createdAt: -1 }
  { recipient: 1, isRead: 1, createdAt: -1 }
  { recipient: 1, type: 1, createdAt: -1 }

STATIC METHODS:
  getNotifications(userId: ObjectId, options?: {page?: 1, limit?: 20, type?: string | null, unreadOnly?: false}) => Promise[{notifications: Array[Notification], pagination: {page, limit, total, hasMore}}]: paginated fetch with optional type filter and unread filter; populates sender (username, displayName, avatar, isVerified), post, reel
  getUnreadCount(userId: ObjectId) => Promise[number]: countDocuments with isRead=false
  getUnreadCountByType(userId: ObjectId) => Promise[{total: number, [type]: number}]: aggregation $group by type
  markAsRead(notificationId: ObjectId, userId: ObjectId) => Promise[Notification]: findOneAndUpdate with {new: true}
  markAllAsRead(userId: ObjectId, type?: string) => Promise[{ modifiedCount }]: updateMany; optional type filter
  createNotification(data: {sender: ObjectId, recipient: ObjectId, type: string, post?: ObjectId, reel?: ObjectId, conversation?: ObjectId, whisper?: ObjectId, comment?: ObjectId, message?: string}) => Promise[Notification | null]: validates sender != recipient, checks for recent duplicate within 1 min (same sender+recipient+type+post+reel), creates notification, then async (non-blocking) triggers pushService.sendToUser with formatted title/body based on type, includes type-specific metadata (postId, reelId, conversationId, etc.); never waits for push result
  deleteOldNotifications(daysOld?: 30) => Promise[{ deletedCount }]: deletes createdAt < cutoff AND isRead=true

files.purpose: Individual messages in conversations with reply chains, reactions, and read-by tracking.
files.schema:
FIELDS:
  conversation (ObjectId): ref Conversation, required
  sender (ObjectId): ref User, required
  type (enum[text|image|video|gif|sticker|system]): default text
  content (String): trimmed
  media (Object): url (str), thumbnail (str), width (num), height (num), mimeType (str)
  replyTo (ObjectId): ref Message (optional, for replies)
  reactions (Map[string, string]): userId => emoji
  readBy (Array[ObjectId]): ref User
  isDeleted (Boolean): default false
  timestamps: true

INDEXES:
  { conversation: 1, createdAt: -1 }: compound index satisfies equality + sort for chat history queries

files.purpose: DM and group chat containers; tracks participants, last message, and per-user unread counts.
files.schema:
FIELDS:
  type (enum[direct|group]): default direct
  participants (Array[ObjectId]): ref User, required
  groupName (String): 100 max, trimmed (for group chats)
  groupAvatar (String): default null
  groupDescription (String): 500 max
  admins (Array[ObjectId]): ref User (for group chats)
  createdBy (ObjectId): ref User (group creator)
  lastMessage (ObjectId): ref Message
  lastMessageContent (String): default 'Started a conversation' (denormalized for list preview)
  lastMessageSender (ObjectId): ref User
  lastMessageAt (Date): default Date.now
  unreadCounts (Map[string, number]): userId => unread count
  timestamps: true

INDEXES:
  { participants: 1 }
  { participants: 1, lastMessageAt: -1 }
  { lastMessageAt: -1 }
  { type: 1 }

files.purpose: Ephemeral media (stories and direct snaps); auto-expires via TTL; tracks viewers and reactions.
files.schema:
FIELDS:
  user (ObjectId): ref User, required, indexed
  audience (enum[story|direct]): default story, required
  recipients (Array[ObjectId]): ref User (empty for story snaps)
  mediaType (enum[image|video]): default image
  mediaUrl (String): required (Cloudinary URL)
  publicId (String): Cloudinary public ID
  thumbnailUrl (String)
  durationMs (Number): display duration in ms, default 5000
  caption (String): 280 max, trimmed
  viewers (Array[{user: ObjectId ref User, viewedAt: Date}]): bounded sub-collection
  viewCount (Number): default 0
  reactions (Map[string, string]): userId => emoji
  expiresAt (Date): required; expires: 0 (TTL auto-delete ~24h after creation)
  timestamps: true

INDEXES:
  { audience: 1, user: 1, createdAt: -1 }
  { audience: 1, recipients: 1, createdAt: -1 }

STATIC METHODS:
  getStoryRail(viewerId: ObjectId, followingIds?: Array[ObjectId]) => Promise[Array[{authorId: string, user: User, snaps: Array[Snap], hasUnseen: bool}]]: builds story rail for viewer; groups by author; marks unseen rings; orders with viewer's own ring first, then unseen, then seen; snap objects include seen flag
  getDirectInbox(userId: ObjectId) => Promise[Snap[]]: finds audience=direct, recipients includes userId, expiresAt > now, sorted createdAt desc, populated user
  defaultExpiry() => Date: returns Date.now() + 24h

CONSTANT:
  DEFAULT_TTL_MS = 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000

files.purpose: Location-based anonymous messaging with voting and replies; auto-expires.
files.schema:
FIELDS:
  content (String): 280 max, required, trimmed
  location (GeoJSON Point): required; coordinates [lng, lat]
  city (String)
  region (String)
  author (ObjectId): ref User, required, select=false (never exposed)
  upvotes (Number): default 0
  downvotes (Number): default 0
  score (Number): upvotes - downvotes, default 0
  voters (Array[{user: ObjectId ref User (select=false), vote: enum[up|down]}])
  replies (Array[{content: str (200 max), author: ObjectId ref User (select=false), upvotes: Number (default 0), createdAt: Date}])
  reports (Number): default 0
  isHidden (Boolean): default false
  expiresAt (Date): default Date.now() + 24h; expires: 0 (TTL)
  timestamps: true

INDEXES:
  { location: 2dsphere }
  { score: -1, createdAt: -1 }

STATIC METHODS:
  getNearby(lng: number, lat: number, radiusKm?: 5, limit?: 50) => Promise[Whisper[]]: $near geospatial query with $maxDistance in meters, isHidden=false, sorted score desc then createdAt desc; excludes author and voters.user
  vote(whisperId: ObjectId, userId: ObjectId, voteType: enum[up|down]) => Promise[{upvotes: number, downvotes: number, score: number}]: toggles vote; if same vote type, removes; if different, changes; updates counters; recalculates score; +voters.user selection

INSTANCE METHODS:
  addReply(content: string, authorId: ObjectId) => Promise[reply]: pushes reply object, saves, returns new reply

files.purpose: Collaborative storytelling with segment voting, contributor tracking, and auto-completion.
files.schema:
INNER SEGMENT SCHEMA:
  content (String): 500 max, required
  media (String): URL to image/video
  mediaType (enum[image|video|none]): default none
  author (ObjectId): ref User, required
  votes (Number): default 0
  voters (Array[{user: ObjectId ref User, value: enum[1|-1]}])
  isApproved (Boolean): default false
  createdAt (Date): default Date.now

MAIN FIELDS:
  title (String): 80 max, required, trimmed
  previewImage (String)
  starterContent (String): 500 max, required (initial prompt)
  starterAuthor (ObjectId): ref User, required
  segments (Array[segmentSchema]): approved segments
  pendingSegments (Array[segmentSchema]): segments awaiting votes
  segmentCount (Number): default 0
  contributorCount (Number): default 0
  contributors (Array[ObjectId]): ref User (all who contributed)
  totalVotes (Number): default 0
  likes (Number): default 0
  status (enum[active|complete|archived]): default active
  maxSegments (Number): default 50 (auto-complete when reached)
  isPublic (Boolean): default true
  allowAnyone (Boolean): default true
  requireVotes (Number): default 3 (threshold to approve)
  genre (enum[mystery|comedy|drama|horror|romance|adventure|other]): default other
  tags (Array[String])
  timestamps: true

INDEXES:
  { status: 1, likes: -1 }
  { genre: 1 }
  { segments.author: 1 }

VIRTUALS:
  lastSegment: get() => if segments.length > 0 then segments[-1].content else starterContent

STATIC METHODS:
  getActiveChains(options?: {genre?: string, limit?: 20, skip?: 0}) => Promise[ChainStory[]]: status=active, optional genre filter, sorted likes desc then contributorCount desc, skip+limit pagination, populated starterAuthor (username, avatar), excludes pendingSegments and voters

INSTANCE METHODS:
  submitSegment(content: string, authorId: ObjectId, media?: string) => Promise[segment]: validates status=active, segmentCount < maxSegments, detects mediaType from URL suffix, pushes to pendingSegments, saves, returns segment
  voteOnSegment(segmentId: ObjectId, userId: ObjectId, value: enum[1|-1]) => Promise[{votes: number, approved: bool}]: finds segment in pendingSegments, checks existing vote (removes old vote from count, then adds new vote), updates votes, checks if votes >= requireVotes (approves: moves to segments, removes from pending, increments segmentCount, adds contributor if new), increments totalVotes, saves, returns result
  toggleLike(userId: ObjectId) => Promise[number]: increments likes, saves, returns new count

files.purpose: Deep behavioral tracking for personalization (session patterns, content affinities, engagement velocity, reward sensitivity).
files.schema:

    avgSessionDurationMs (Number): default 0
    totalSessions (Number): default 0
    peakHours (Array[{hour: num (0-23), weight: num (default 1)}])
    avgScrollVelocity (Number): pixels/sec, default 0
    avgDwellTimeMs (Number): time per post, default 0
    dwellTimeToLikeMs (Number): avg ms before liking, default 2000
    postsPerSession (Number): default 0

    avgTimeToLikeMs (Number): default 0
    avgTimeToCommentMs (Number): default 0
    likeRate (Number): likes per post viewed, default 0
    commentRate (Number): default 0
  
  rewardSensitivity (Object):
    engagementSensitivity (Number): default 0.5
    viralPreference (Number): 0=niche, 1=viral, default 0.5
    noveltyPreference (Number): 0=familiar, 1=new, default 0.5

    lastActivityAt (Date)

CONSTANTS:

  getOrCreate(userId: ObjectId) => Promise[UserBehavior]: finds by user; if not found, creates with user=userId, saves
  recordView(userId: ObjectId, post: Object | ObjectId, dwellTimeMs?: 0) => Promise[UserBehavior]: gets or creates behavior, checks if new session (no startedAt or lastActivityAt > SESSION_TIMEOUT_MS), if new session, saves previous session stats (duration, avgDurationMs, postsPerSession), resets session, increments postsViewed, updates lastActivityAt, tracks dwell time via EMA (0.9 * prev + 0.1 * new), pushes postId to recentlySeenPosts (capped at MAX_RECENT_POSTS), calls updateAffinitiesFromPost, saves
  recordLike(userId: ObjectId, post: Object | ObjectId, timeSinceViewMs?: 0) => Promise[UserBehavior]: gets or creates, increments likesGiven, updates avgTimeToLikeMs via EMA (0.8 * prev + 0.2 * new), recalculates likeRate = likesGiven / postsViewed, calls updateAffinitiesFromPost with weight 2.0, saves

INSTANCE METHODS:

  getMediaType(post: Object) => string: detects media type from post.content.media array; returns video > gif > image > text

specs.overview: Pulse backend authentication, user management, and referral system controllers. Handles OTP-based login (email/phone), Firebase Google authentication, username/password creation, JWT token generation and refresh, multi-device session management, user profile operations, follow/block relationships, and referral tracking. All responses follow {success, error/data, code} convention. Database operations use MongoDB with Users, Sessions, Follow, OTP, and Notification collections. Caching via Redis for rate limiting, token revocation, and feed invalidation.

files.purpose: HTTP request handlers for all authentication flows: OTP-based auth (email/phone), Firebase/Google login, username/password creation, token refresh, OTP resend, username availability check, user info retrieval, and logout.
exports: initiateAuth(req, res): async - POST /api/v1/auth/initiate, validates email/phone, checks user existence, triggers OTP send
verifyOTP(req, res): async - POST /api/v1/auth/verify-otp, validates 6-digit OTP against hashed DB record, creates user or updates auth method, returns tokens or tempToken
createUsername(req, res): async - POST /api/v1/auth/create-username, validates tempToken and username/password, creates user session
refreshToken(req, res): async - POST /api/v1/auth/refresh-token, refreshes expired access token from refresh token
resendOTP(req, res): async - POST /api/v1/auth/resend-otp, re-sends OTP after deleting old one
checkUsername(req, res): async - GET /api/v1/auth/check-username?username=x, checks availability
getCurrentUser(req, res): async - GET /api/v1/auth/me, returns authenticated user info
logout(req, res): async - POST /api/v1/auth/logout, deactivates device session and revokes access token
firebaseLogin(req, res): async - POST /api/v1/auth/firebase-login, verifies Firebase/Google token, creates or updates user, returns tokens or tempToken
authRateLimit: middleware - Redis-backed rate limiter for auth endpoints
otpRateLimit: middleware - Redis-backed rate limiter for OTP requests
files.details:
AUTHENTICATION CONTROLLER - COMPREHENSIVE SPECIFICATION

=== initiateAuth ===
Endpoint: POST /api/v1/auth/initiate
Middleware: authRateLimit (Redis-backed)
Request Body: {method: 'email'|'phone', identifier: string, deviceId?: string, platform?: string, deviceName?: string, appVersion?: string}
Validation:
  - method must be 'email' or 'phone' (MISSING_REQUIRED_FIELDS if absent)
  - identifier required (MISSING_REQUIRED_FIELDS if absent)
  - For phone: strip \D, must match /^[6-9]\d{9}$/ (10 digits starting 6-9) OR /^91[6-9]\d{9}$/ (with country code); convert to E.164 +91XXXXXXXXXX
  - For email: /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/, lowercase and trim
  - deviceId auto-generated as web-{timestamp} if missing
Process:
  1. Call validatePhoneNumber(identifier) for phone or validateEmail(identifier) for email
  2. Build processedIdentifier in canonical form
  3. Check User.findByAuthMethod(method, identifier) to determine purpose ('login' if exists, 'signup' if new)
  4. Call authService.initiateAuth(processedIdentifier, method, deviceInfo, req.ip)
  5. Service calls customOTPService.sendEmailOTP() or sendSMSOTP()
  6. OTP.create({identifier, type, purpose, hashedCode (bcrypt), ipAddress, expiresAt: now+10min (email) or now+5min (SMS)})
  7. Email sent via Brevo SMTP or SMS via Twilio
Response (200): {success: true, method, identifier, nextStep: 'verify_otp', purpose: 'login'|'signup', userExists: boolean, message: 'OTP sent to...'}
Error (400): {success: false, error: string, code: 'MISSING_REQUIRED_FIELDS'|'INVALID_METHOD'|'MISSING_DEVICE_ID'|'AUTH_INITIATION_FAILED'}
Side Effects:
  - OTP document created in MongoDB (auto-expires via TTL index)
  - Redis rate limit counter incremented: otp_rate_limit:{type}:{identifier}
  - SMS: global daily budget checked and incremented: sms_budget:{YYYY-MM-DD}
  - Email sent via Brevo or SMS via Twilio

=== verifyOTP ===
Endpoint: POST /api/v1/auth/verify-otp
Middleware: authRateLimit
Request Body: {identifier: string, otp: string, method: 'email'|'phone', deviceId: string, platform?: string}
Validation: All fields required, method must be 'email' or 'phone'
Process:
  1. Convert identifier to canonical form (E.164 for phone, lowercase for email)
  2. Call authService.verifyOTPAndAuth(identifier, otp, method, deviceInfo, ip)
  3. Service calls customOTPService.verifyOTP(identifier, otp, purpose, ip)
  4. OTP.findValidOTP({identifier, purpose, verified: false, expiresAt > now}) returns most recent
  5. bcrypt.compare(plaintext_otp, otpDoc.hashedCode) must match
  6. otpDoc.attempts < otpDoc.maxAttempts (default 3) or throw 'Invalid OTP'
  7. If user doesn't exist, call createNewUser(method, identifier, otpResult)
     - Set name from email prefix or phone suffix
     - Set authMethods[{type, identifier, verified: true, verifiedAt: now}]
     - Set isVerified: true, lastLoginAt: now
  8. If user exists, call updateUserAuthMethod(user, method, identifier)
     - Add/update authMethod entry
     - Set isVerified: true, lastLoginAt: now
  9. If user.username missing, return tempToken for username creation step
  10. Else create session via createUserSession(), return accessToken + refreshToken
Response (200) - requires username: {success: true, nextStep: 'create_username', tempToken: JWT, user: {id, name, email, phone, isVerified}, message: '...'}
Response (200) - has username: {success: true, nextStep: 'complete', user: sanitized, tokens: {accessToken, refreshToken, tokenType: 'Bearer', expiresIn: 900}, session: {deviceId, expiresAt}, message: 'Authentication successful'}
Error (401): {success: false, error: string, code: 'INVALID_OTP'} - expired, invalid, or max attempts exceeded
Error (400): {success: false, error: string, code: 'OTP_VERIFICATION_FAILED'} - other errors
Side Effects:
  - OTP.markAsVerified() increments attempts
  - User.create() or User.save() with verified=true and updated authMethods
  - Session.create({userId, deviceId, accessToken: hash(token), refreshToken: hash(token), ipAddress, expiresAt: +7d})
  - Session.updateMany() to deactivate other devices

=== createUsername ===
Endpoint: POST /api/v1/auth/create-username
Middleware: authRateLimit
Request Body: {tempToken: JWT, username: string, password: string, deviceId: string, platform?: string}
Validation:
  - tempToken decoded via jwtService.verifyTempToken(), must have purpose='username_creation'
  - username regex /^[a-zA-Z0-9_]{3,20}$/ (INVALID_USERNAME)
  - password >= 8 chars
  - username not already taken (USERNAME_EXISTS)
  - username not already set on user (USERNAME_ALREADY_SET)
Process:
  1. Decode tempToken -> userId
  2. User.findById(userId)
  3. User.findOne({username: lower(username), isActive: true}) -> must not exist
  4. Hash password with bcrypt(password, 12)
  5. user.username = username, user.passwordHash = hashed, user.updatedAt = now, user.save()
  6. Call createUserSession() -> generate and hash tokens, create Session record, deactivate other devices
Response (200): {success: true, user: sanitized, tokens: {accessToken, refreshToken, tokenType: 'Bearer', expiresIn: 900}, session: {deviceId, expiresAt}, message: 'Account setup completed successfully'}
Error (400): code 'INVALID_USERNAME'|'MISSING_REQUIRED_FIELDS'|'USERNAME_ALREADY_SET'
Error (409): code 'USERNAME_EXISTS'
Error (500): code 'INTERNAL_ERROR'
Side Effects: User.save(), Session.create()

=== refreshToken ===
Endpoint: POST /api/v1/auth/refresh-token
Middleware: refreshLimiter
Request Body: {refreshToken: JWT}
Validation: refreshToken required and non-empty
Process:
  1. jwtService.verifyRefreshToken(token) -> extract userId, deviceId
  2. Session.findOne({userId, deviceId, refreshToken: hash(token), isActive: true, expiresAt > now})
  3. If not found, throw 'Invalid or expired refresh token'
  4. User.findById(userId)
  5. Generate new accessToken via jwtService.generateAccessToken({userId, username, email, isVerified})
  6. Generate new refreshToken via jwtService.generateRefreshToken({userId, deviceId, tokenId: crypto.randomBytes(16).toString('hex')})
  7. Hash both tokens with SHA256
  8. Session.accessToken = hash(new), Session.refreshToken = hash(new), Session.lastActivity = now
  9. session.save()
Response (200): {success: true, tokens: {accessToken (new 15m), refreshToken (new 7d), tokenType: 'Bearer', expiresIn: 900}}
Error (401): code 'INVALID_REFRESH_TOKEN'
Error (500): code 'INTERNAL_ERROR'
Side Effects: Session.save()

=== resendOTP ===
Endpoint: POST /api/v1/auth/resend-otp
Middleware: otpRateLimit
Request Body: {identifier: string, method: 'email'|'phone'}
Validation: Both required, method must be 'email' or 'phone'
Process:
  1. Check user existence to determine purpose
  2. customOTPService.resendOTP(identifier, method, purpose, userId, ip)
  3. OTP.deleteOne({identifier, purpose, verified: false}) if exists
  4. Re-send via sendEmailOTP() or sendSMSOTP() -> OTP.create() with new hashedCode
Response (200): {success: true, method, identifier, purpose, message: 'OTP resent to...'}
Error (400): code 'RESEND_OTP_FAILED'|'MISSING_REQUIRED_FIELDS'|'INVALID_METHOD'
Side Effects: OTP.deleteOne() then OTP.create(), email/SMS sent

=== checkUsername ===
Endpoint: GET /api/v1/auth/check-username?username=term
Validation: username required query param, max 50 chars
Process:
  1. Validate regex /^[a-zA-Z0-9_]{3,20}$/
  2. User.findOne({username: lower(username), isActive: true})
Response (200): {success: true, available: boolean, username, message: 'Username is available'|'Username is already taken'}
Error (400): {success: false, available: false, error: 'Username must be 3-20 characters...'}
Error (500): code 'INTERNAL_ERROR'
Side Effects: None

=== getCurrentUser ===
Endpoint: GET /api/v1/auth/me
Middleware: verifyAccessToken (extracts req.user.userId from JWT)
Process:
  1. authService.getCurrentUser(userId) -> User.findById(userId).select('-passwordHash')
Response (200): {success: true, user: full user document minus passwordHash}
Error (500): code 'INTERNAL_ERROR'
Side Effects: None

=== logout ===
Endpoint: POST /api/v1/auth/logout
Middleware: verifyAccessToken
Request Body: {deviceId: string}
Validation: deviceId required
Process:
  1. Extract accessToken from Authorization header: Bearer {token}
  2. authService.logoutUser(userId, deviceId, accessToken)
  3. Session.updateMany({userId, deviceId, isActive: true}, {isActive: false, updatedAt: now})
  4. If accessToken provided, cache it as revoked: cacheService.set(`revoked_token:{SHA256(accessToken)}`, '1', 900)
Response (200): {success: true, message: 'Logged out successfully'}
Error (400): code 'MISSING_DEVICE_ID'
Error (500): code 'INTERNAL_ERROR'
Side Effects: Session.updateMany(), cacheService.set() (token blacklist, 15min TTL)

=== firebaseLogin ===
Endpoint: POST /api/v1/auth/firebase-login
Middleware: authRateLimit
Request Body: {idToken?: JWT, accessToken?: JWT, deviceId: string, platform?: string, deviceName?: string, email?: string, name?: string, picture?: string, googleId?: string}
Validation: At least one of idToken or accessToken required, deviceId required
Process:
  1. Strategy 1: If idToken and firebaseConfig.isAvailable(), verify via Firebase Admin SDK: admin.auth().verifyIdToken(idToken) -> extract email, name, picture, googleId (uid)
  2. Strategy 2: If step 1 fails, verify via Google APIs:
     - POST https://www.googleapis.com/oauth2/v3/userinfo with Authorization: Bearer {accessToken}
     - Fallback to POST https://oauth2.googleapis.com/tokeninfo?access_token={token}
     - Use extraInfo parameters as fallback for name/picture
  3. If both fail, throw 'Invalid authentication token'
  4. Check User.findByAuthMethod('email', email)
  5. If new user, createNewUser('email', email, {verified: true, via: 'google'})
  6. If existing, updateUserAuthMethod(user, 'email', email)
  7. Update profile if provided: user.avatar = picture, user.name = name, user.googleId = googleId
  8. user.save()
  9. If user.username missing, return tempToken
  10. Else createUserSession() and return tokens
Response (200) - no username: {success: true, nextStep: 'create_username', requiresUsername: true, tempToken: JWT, user: {id, name, email, avatar, isVerified: true}, message: 'Please create a username and password'}
Response (200) - has username: {success: true, nextStep: 'complete', user: sanitized, accessToken, refreshToken, tokens: {...}, session: {...}, message: 'Authentication successful'}
Error (400): code 'MISSING_FIELDS'
Error (401): code 'TOKEN_EXPIRED' or 'AUTH_FAILED'
Side Effects: User.create() or User.save(), Session.create()

files.purpose: User profile, search, follow, block, and onboarding handlers
files.details:
USER CONTROLLER - COMPREHENSIVE SPECIFICATION

=== searchUsers (GET /api/v1/users/search?q=term) ===
Query: q string (0-50 chars)
Process:
  1. If q empty, return {success: true, data: []}
  2. Trim q to 50 chars max
  3. PRIMARY: Prefix search on username (indexed) - User.find({username: {$regex: `^{escapedTerm}`, $options: 'i'}, isActive: true, _id: {$ne: currentUserId}}).select('username profile.displayName profile.avatar avatar isVerified').limit(20).lean()
  4. If results.length < 20 AND term.length >= 2, AUGMENT with text search - User.find({$text: {$search: term}, isActive: true, _id: {$ne: currentUserId}}, {score: {$meta: 'textScore'}}).sort({score: {$meta: 'textScore'}}).limit(20).lean()
  5. Merge deduplicated (by _id), return up to 20
Response (200): {success: true, data: [{_id, username, profile.displayName, profile.avatar, avatar, isVerified}]}

=== getCurrentUser (GET /api/v1/users/me) ===
Process:
  1. User.findById(userId).select('-passwordHash -authMethods')
  2. Follow.getFollowerCount(userId), getFollowingCount(userId), Post.countDocuments({author: userId, isActive: true})
  3. If stats drifted, sync: user.stats.followers = count, save user
Response (200): {success: true, data: full user with synced stats}

=== getUserByUsername (GET /api/v1/users/:username) ===
Process:
  1. User.findOne({username}).select('-passwordHash -authMethods -email -phone').lean()
  2. Get stats from Follow + Post, isFollowing from Follow, isOwnProfile check
Response (200): {success: true, data: {...user, stats, isFollowing, isOwnProfile}}
Error (404)

=== getUserPosts (GET /api/v1/users/:username/posts?page=1&limit=20) ===
Process:
  1. Find user by username
  2. Query: {author: userId, isActive: true}
  3. If NOT ownProfile, add isAnonymous: false
  4. Post.find(query).populate('author', 'username name avatar profile').sort({createdAt: -1}).skip((page-1)*limit).limit(limit)
Response (200): {success: true, data: [...posts], pagination: {page, limit, hasMore}}
Header: Cache-Control: no-store

=== toggleFollow (POST /api/v1/users/:username/follow) ===
Process:
  1. Find targetUser by username
  2. If self-follow, 400 'Cannot follow yourself'
  3. Follow.toggleFollow(currentUserId, targetUserId) -> {followed, followerCount, followingCount}
     - Delete-first atomic: DELETE if exists, else CREATE
  4. Update both user stats: User.updateOne({_id: targetUserId}, {$set: {'stats.followers': count}}), User.updateOne({_id: currentUserId}, {$set: {'stats.following': count}})
  5. Cache invalidation: cacheService.del(`followgraph:{currentUserId}`), cacheService.del(`reel:following:{currentUserId}`)
  6. If followed=true, Notification.createNotification({recipient: targetUserId, sender: currentUserId, type: 'follow', message: 'started following you'})
Response (200): {success: true, data: {isFollowing: boolean}}

=== updateProfile (PATCH /api/v1/users/me) ===
Allowed fields: profile.displayName, profile.bio, profile.location, profile.website, profile.avatar, profile.coverPhoto, avatar, settings.*, privacy.*
Auto-sync: if profile.avatar updated, also set root avatar; if root avatar updated, also set profile.avatar
Response (200): {success: true, data: updated user}

=== uploadAvatar (POST /api/v1/users/me/avatar) ===
File: multipart file in req.file.buffer
Process:
  1. Stream buffer to cloudinary.uploader.upload_stream({folder: 'pulse/avatars', transformation: [{width: 400, height: 400, crop: 'fill', gravity: 'face'}]})
  2. User.findByIdAndUpdate(userId, {'profile.avatar': url, avatar: url}, {new: true})
Response (200): {success: true, data: updated user}

=== getFollowers (GET /api/v1/users/:username/followers?page=1&limit=20) ===
Process:
  1. Find user by username
  2. Follow.find({following: userId}).sort({createdAt: -1}).skip().limit().populate('follower', 'username profile.displayName profile.avatar avatar isVerified').lean()
Response (200): {success: true, data: [...follower docs]}

=== getFollowing (GET /api/v1/users/:username/following?page=1&limit=20) ===
Process:
  1. Find user by username
  2. Follow.find({follower: userId}).sort({createdAt: -1}).skip().limit().populate('following', 'username profile.displayName profile.avatar avatar isVerified').lean()
Response (200): {success: true, data: [...following docs]}

=== changePassword (PATCH /api/v1/users/me/password) ===
Body: {currentPassword?: string, newPassword: string}
Validation: newPassword >= 8 chars; if user has passwordHash, currentPassword required and must match
Process:
  1. User.findById(userId).select('+passwordHash')
  2. If passwordHash exists, bcrypt.compare(currentPassword, hash) must succeed
  3. Hash newPassword with bcrypt(password, 12)
  4. user.passwordHash = hash, user.save()
Response (200): {success: true, message: 'Password updated successfully'}

=== deleteAccount (DELETE /api/v1/users/me) ===
Process (soft-delete):
  1. User.findById(userId)
  2. Set isActive=false, isOnline=false, email=undefined, phone=undefined, username=`deleted_{id.slice(-6)}`, passwordHash=undefined, authMethods=[], fcmTokens=[], profile fields blanked
  3. user.save()
  4. Post.updateMany({author: userId}, {isActive: false}), Follow.deleteMany({$or: [{follower: userId}, {following: userId}]})
Response (200): {success: true, message: 'Account deleted'}

=== blockUser (POST /api/v1/users/:username/block) ===
Process:
  1. Find targetUser by username
  2. If self-block, 400
  3. User.findByIdAndUpdate(currentUserId, {$addToSet: {blockedUsers: targetUserId}})
  4. Follow.deleteOne({follower: currentUserId, following: targetUserId}), Follow.deleteOne({follower: targetUserId, following: currentUserId})
Response (200): {success: true, message: 'User blocked'}

=== unblockUser (DELETE /api/v1/users/:username/block) ===
Process:
  1. User.findByIdAndUpdate(currentUserId, {$pull: {blockedUsers: targetUserId}})
Response (200): {success: true, message: 'User unblocked'}

=== getBlockedUsers (GET /api/v1/users/me/blocked) ===
Process:
  1. User.findById(userId).select('blockedUsers').populate('blockedUsers', 'username profile.displayName profile.avatar avatar isVerified').lean()
Response (200): {success: true, data: [...blockedUsers]}

=== getOnboardingOptions (GET /api/v1/users/onboarding/options) ===
Process:
  1. Return embeddingService.TOPIC_KEYS and embeddingService.VIBES
Response (200): {success: true, data: {topics: [...], vibes: [...]}}

=== submitOnboarding (POST /api/v1/users/onboarding) ===
Body: {topics: [string], vibes: [string]}
Validation: Filter to valid keys, max 10 topics/5 vibes; at least one required
Process:
  1. userVectorService.seedFromOnboarding(userId, {topics, vibes}) -> builds Redis cache for cold-start feed
  2. User.updateOne({_id: userId}, {$set: {'onboarding.topics': topics, 'onboarding.vibes': vibes, 'onboarding.completedAt': now}})
Response (200): {success: true, data: {topics, vibes}}

files.purpose: Referral code generation, application with badge awards, and stats retrieval
files.details:
REFERRAL CONTROLLER

=== getMyCode (GET /api/v1/referral/my-code) ===
Process:
  1. User.findById(userId or req.user._id)
  2. If user.referralCode missing, generate: cuid2.substring(0, 8).toUpperCase()
  3. user.save()
  4. Build shareUrl: `https://getpulse.app/join?ref={code}`
Response (200): {success: true, data: {referralCode: string (8 char), shareUrl, shareMessage, referralCount}}
Error (404): {success: false, error: 'User not found'}
Error (500): {success: false, error: 'Failed to get referral code'}

=== applyCode (POST /api/v1/referral/apply) ===
Body: {code: string (8 char, required)}
Validation: code required and string
Process:
  1. currentUser = User.findById(userId)
  2. If currentUser.referredBy exists, 409 'You have already used a referral code'
  3. referrer = User.findOne({referralCode: code.toUpperCase(), isActive: true})
  4. If not found, 404 'Invalid referral code'
  5. If referrer._id == currentUser._id, 400 'You cannot use your own referral code'
  6. currentUser.referredBy = referrer._id
  7. Add early-adopter badge to currentUser if not present
  8. currentUser.save()
  9. referrer.referralCount += 1
  10. Add early-adopter badge to referrer if not present
  11. referrer.save()
Response (200): {success: true, message: 'Referral code applied successfully! You both earned an Early Adopter badge 🎉', data: {referredBy: {username, displayName}, badgeAwarded: boolean}}
Error (400): code 'MISSING_FIELDS' | self-referral
Error (404): 'User not found' | 'Invalid referral code'
Error (409): 'You have already used a referral code'
Error (500): 'Failed to apply referral code'

=== getStats (GET /api/v1/referral/stats) ===
Process:
  1. user = User.findById(userId).select('referralCode referralCount')
  2. referredUsers = User.find({referredBy: userId}).sort({createdAt: -1}).limit(50).select('username profile.displayName profile.avatar createdAt').lean()
Response (200): {success: true, data: {referralCode: string|null, totalReferrals: int, referredUsers: [{username, displayName, avatar, joinedAt}]}}
Error (404): 'User not found'
Error (500): 'Failed to get referral stats'

files.purpose: Core authentication business logic: OTP flow, user creation, session management, token refresh
exports: verifyOTPAndAuth(identifier, otp, method, deviceInfo, ipAddress): async
createUsernameAndPassword(tempToken, username, password, deviceInfo, ipAddress): async
loginWithFirebase(idToken, accessToken, deviceInfo, ipAddress, extraInfo): async
files.schema:
SERVICE CLASS (no direct schema). Implements all authentication flows. Key methods:

initateAuth(identifier, method, deviceInfo, ipAddress):
  - Validates method (email|phone)
  - Checks user existence
  - Calls customOTPService.sendEmailOTP() or sendSMSOTP()
  - Returns {success: true, method, identifier, nextStep: 'verify_otp', purpose: 'login'|'signup', userExists: boolean, message}

verifyOTPAndAuth(identifier, otp, method, deviceInfo, ipAddress):
  - Calls customOTPService.verifyOTP() -> {success, verified}
  - Creates user if new, updates authMethods if existing
  - Calls createUserSession() if username exists
  - Returns tokens or tempToken

createUserSession(user, deviceInfo, ipAddress):
  - Generates accessToken and refreshToken
  - Hashes both with SHA256
  - Creates Session document with hashed tokens
  - Deactivates other sessions for same device
  - Returns {tokens: {accessToken, refreshToken, tokenType, expiresIn}, session: {deviceId, expiresAt}}

refreshAccessToken(refreshToken):
  - Verifies refreshToken JWT
  - Finds Session by userId, deviceId, and hashed token
  - Generates new accessToken + refreshToken
  - Updates Session
  - Returns new token pair

logoutUser(userId, deviceId, accessToken):
  - Deactivates sessions
  - Caches accessToken as revoked (900s TTL) in Redis
  - Returns success message

loginWithFirebase(idToken, accessToken, deviceInfo, ipAddress, extraInfo):
  - Tries Firebase Admin SDK verification first
  - Falls back to Google API verification (userinfo or tokeninfo endpoints)
  - Creates or updates user
  - Returns tokens or tempToken

sanitizeUser(user):
  - Returns {id, username, name, email, phone, avatar, bio, isVerified, settings, stats, createdAt, updatedAt}

files.purpose: OTP generation, sending (email/SMS), and validation with rate limiting
exports: resendOTP(identifier, method, purpose, userId, ipAddress): async
files.schema:
OTP SERVICE

EMAIL:
  - Transport: Brevo (nodemailer-brevo-transport)
  - From: 'Pulsee <rajveershekhawat626@gmail.com>' (MUST match Brevo verified sender)
  - Requires: process.env.EMAIL_API_KEY
  - TTL: 10 minutes
  - Max attempts: 3
  - HTML templates for signup, login, password_reset

SMS:
  - Provider: Twilio
  - Requires: TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN, TWILIO_FROM (phone number)
  - Phone format: E.164 (+91XXXXXXXXXX for India)
  - TTL: 5 minutes
  - Max attempts: 3
  - Global daily budget: SMS_GLOBAL_DAILY_MAX (default 5000), key=sms_budget:{YYYY-MM-DD}

OTP GENERATION:
  - 6-digit numeric code (crypto.randomInt(0, 10))
  - Hashed with bcrypt (cost 10) before DB storage
  - Verified via bcrypt.compare(plaintext, stored_hash)

RATE LIMITING:
  - Per-identifier: 5 OTP requests per 900s (15 min) window
  - Redis key: otp_rate_limit:{type}:{identifier}
  - Uses cacheService.incrementRateLimit(key, windowSeconds)
  - Fails CLOSED in production (SMS costs money, must reject on Redis failure)

STORAGE:
  - OTP.create({userId, identifier, type, purpose, hashedCode, attempts, maxAttempts, verified, verifiedAt, ipAddress, userAgent, expiresAt})
  - TTL index on expiresAt (MongoDB auto-deletes)
  - Purpose enum: 'signup', 'login', 'password_reset', '2fa', 'verification'

VERIFICATION:
  - OTP.findValidOTP(identifier, purpose) -> most recent unverified non-expired
  - bcrypt.compare(plaintext_otp, doc.hashedCode)
  - Increment attempts, check maxAttempts
  - Mark verified=true on success

RESEND:
  - Deletes old OTP: OTP.deleteOne({identifier, purpose, verified: false})
  - Creates new OTP with same params

files.purpose: JWT token generation and verification for access (15m), refresh (7d), and temp tokens (10m)
files.schema:
JWT CONFIGURATION:
  - Secrets: JWT_SECRET, JWT_REFRESH_SECRET, TEMP_JWT_SECRET (from env)
  - Algorithm: HS256
  - Issuer: 'pulse-app'
  - Audience: 'pulse-users'

ACCESS TOKEN (15 minutes):
  - Payload: {userId, username, email, isVerified, type: 'access'}
  - Expiry: 15m (env.JWT_EXPIRES_IN, default '15m')
  - Used by verifyAccessToken middleware

REFRESH TOKEN (7 days):
  - Payload: {userId, deviceId, type: 'refresh', tokenId: hex(16 random bytes)}
  - Expiry: 7d (env.JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRES_IN, default '7d')
  - tokenId ensures per-token uniqueness (stored as hash in Session)

TEMPORARY TOKEN (10 minutes):
  - Payload: {userId, purpose: 'username_creation', type: 'temporary'}
  - Expiry: 10m (hardcoded)
  - Used only for username/password creation post-OTP

VERIFICATION:
  - Checks issuer, audience, algorithms (HS256)
  - Validates type field matches expected ('access'|'refresh'|'temporary')
  - Throws TokenExpiredError or JsonWebTokenError on failure

ERROR RESPONSES:
  - 'Access token expired', 'Invalid access token'
  - 'Refresh token expired', 'Invalid refresh token'
  - 'Temporary token expired', 'Invalid temporary token'

files.purpose: Redis client wrapper with single-flight cache-aside, TTL jitter, pattern deletion, rate limiting
files.schema:
REDIS CONNECTION:
  Production: REDIS_URL (Upstash or other)
  Development: REDIS_HOST (default localhost), REDIS_PORT (default 6379), REDIS_PASSWORD (optional)

OPERATIONS:
  set(key, value, ttl=600):
    - SETEX key ttl JSON.stringify(value) if ttl
    - SET key JSON.stringify(value) if no ttl
    - Returns OK or null on error

  get(key):
    - GET key, JSON.parse result
    - Returns null on miss or error

  del(key):
    - DEL key
    - Returns count deleted (0 or 1)

  exists(key):
    - EXISTS key
    - Returns 0 or 1

SINGLE-FLIGHT GETORSET:
  - Coalesces concurrent cache misses on same key
  - Only ONE caller per worker runs fetchFunction
  - Others await the same promise (prevents stampede)
  - Includes ±10% TTL jitter: ttl + Math.floor((Math.random()-0.5) * spread) where spread = 0.1*ttl
  - Only caches non-null/undefined results
  - Graceful degradation if Redis down

PATTERN DELETION:
  - Uses SCAN (non-blocking) instead of KEYS
  - Iterates with MATCH pattern, COUNT 200
  - Returns total count deleted
  - Example: delPattern('followgraph:*') to invalidate all user feed caches

RATE LIMITING:
  - incrementRateLimit(key, windowSeconds):
    - INCR key (atomic increment)
    - If new (== 1), EXPIRE key windowSeconds
    - Returns current count
    - Used for otp_rate_limit:{type}:{identifier}, sms_budget:{date}

CACHE KEYS (from application):
  - revoked_token:{SHA256(accessToken)}: 900s TTL (token blacklist, checked by auth middleware)
  - followgraph:{userId}: varies (feed graph)
  - reel:following:{userId}: varies (reel cache)
  - otp_rate_limit:email:{email}: 900s (15min)
  - otp_rate_limit:sms:{phone}: 900s (15min)
  - sms_budget:{YYYY-MM-DD}: 86400s (1 day, UTC)

ERROR HANDLING:
  - All methods fail CLOSED (return null/0/false on error, no throw)
  - Production: logs error, continues
  - getOrSet degrades gracefully: calls fetch if cache unavailable

files.purpose: User document schema with auth, profile, stats, settings, privacy, referrals, onboarding
files.schema:
COLLECTION: users
FIELDS:
  username: String (unique sparse, lowercase, 3-20 alphanumeric+underscore)
  name: String (required, max 50)
  email: String (sparse unique, lowercase)
  phone: String (sparse unique, E.164 format)
  passwordHash: String (select: false, bcrypt cost 12)
  authMethods: [{type: enum, identifier: String, verified: Boolean, verifiedAt: Date}]
  profile: {displayName, bio, avatar, coverPhoto, website, location, dateOfBirth, gender}
  avatar: String (synced with profile.avatar)
  stats: {posts, followers, following, likes} (numbers)
  role: enum['user', 'admin', 'moderator'] (default 'user')
  isActive: Boolean (default true)
  isVerified: Boolean (default false)
  isOnline: Boolean (default false)
  lastActive: Date
  privacy: {isPrivate, showEmail, showPhone, showLocation, showOnlineStatus, allowMessages, allowTagging}
  settings: {radius, shareExactLocation, anonymousPosting, pushNotifications, emailNotifications, notifyOnFollow/Like/Comment/Mention, theme, language}
  twoFactorSecret, twoFactorEnabled, lastLoginAt, loginAttempts, lockUntil
  blockedUsers: [ObjectId ref: User]
  lastLocation: GeoJSON Point with coordinates [lon, lat]
  badges: [{type: enum, earnedAt: Date}]
  fcmTokens: [{token, deviceId, platform, lastUsed}]
  lastPostAt, lastCommentAt: Date
  referralCode: String (unique sparse, 8-char uppercase)
  referredBy: ObjectId ref: User
  referralCount: Number (default 0)
  onboarding: {topics: [String], vibes: [String], completedAt: Date}
  createdAt, updatedAt: Date (auto)
INDEXES:
  {username: 1} unique sparse
  {email: 1} unique sparse
  {phone: 1} unique sparse
  {authMethods.type: 1, authMethods.identifier: 1}
  {profile.displayName: 'text', username: 'text', profile.bio: 'text'}
  {isActive: 1, isVerified: 1}
  {stats.followers: -1}
  {lastLocation: '2dsphere'}
  {lastActive: -1}, {createdAt: -1}
  {referralCode: 1} unique sparse

files.purpose: Multi-device session tracking with token hashing and TTL expiry
files.schema:
COLLECTION: sessions
FIELDS:
  userId: ObjectId ref: User (required, indexed)
  deviceId: String (required, indexed)
  deviceInfo: {platform, deviceName, appVersion, osVersion}
  accessToken: String (hashed SHA-256, select: false)
  refreshToken: String (hashed SHA-256, select: false, indexed)
  firebaseToken: String (optional, select: false)
  ipAddress: String (required)
  userAgent: String
  location: {city, country, coordinates}
  isActive: Boolean (default true)
  lastActivity: Date (default now)
  expiresAt: Date (required, TTL index auto-deletes at expiry)
  createdAt, updatedAt: Date (auto)
INDEXES:
  {userId: 1, isActive: 1}
  {deviceId: 1}
  {refreshToken: 1}
  {lastActivity: -1}
  {expiresAt: 1} TTL (expires: 0)
METHODS:
  updateActivity(): saves lastActivity = now
  deactivate(): saves isActive = false
  isExpired(): boolean
  static findActiveSession(userId, deviceId): returns active non-expired
  static deactivateUserSessions(userId, excludeDeviceId): bulk deactivate
  static cleanupExpired(): deletes old/inactive records

files.purpose: OTP document storage with expiry, attempt tracking, verification state
files.schema:
COLLECTION: otps
FIELDS:
  userId: ObjectId ref: User (optional)
  identifier: String (required, email or E.164 phone)
  type: enum['email', 'sms'] (required)
  purpose: enum['signup', 'login', 'password_reset', '2fa', 'verification'] (required)
  hashedCode: String (required, bcrypt hash of 6-digit OTP)
  attempts: Number (default 0)
  maxAttempts: Number (default 3)
  verified: Boolean (default false)
  verifiedAt: Date
  ipAddress: String (required)
  userAgent: String
  expiresAt: Date (required, TTL index auto-deletes)
  createdAt, updatedAt: Date (auto)
INDEXES:
  {identifier: 1, purpose: 1, verified: 1}
  {userId: 1}
  {createdAt: 1} expireAfterSeconds: 1800 (30min max)
  {expiresAt: 1} TTL (expires: 0)
METHODS:
  incrementAttempts(): save attempts++
  markAsVerified(): save verified=true, verifiedAt=now
  isExpired(), isMaxAttemptsReached(): boolean
  static findValidOTP(identifier, purpose): unverified non-expired sorted by createdAt
  static cleanupExpired(): delete expiresAt < now

files.purpose: Dedicated follow relationship collection for O(1) follow/unfollow and efficient counts
files.schema:
COLLECTION: follows
FIELDS:
  follower: ObjectId ref: User (required, indexed)
  following: ObjectId ref: User (required, indexed)
  createdAt, updatedAt: Date (auto)
INDEXES:
  {follower: 1, following: 1} unique (prevents duplicate follows)
  {following: 1, createdAt: -1} (get followers of X)
  {follower: 1, createdAt: -1} (get who X follows)
STATIC METHODS:
  toggleFollow(followerId, followingId): async
    - Delete-first atomic: deleteOne if exists, else create
    - Handles concurrent duplicates via unique constraint + try-catch
    - Returns {followed: boolean, followerCount: int, followingCount: int}
  isFollowing(followerId, followingId): async boolean
  getFollowerCount(userId): async int
  getFollowingCount(userId): async int
  getFollowerIds(userId): async [ObjectId array]

files.purpose: HTTP handlers for CRUD posts, comments, likes, search, trending hashtags
files.details:
createPost: POST /api/v1/posts, body {text, media:[], location, visibility='public', allowComments=true, isAnonymous=false}. Creates Post doc with author=req.user.userId, content={text,media[]}, location, visibility, allowComments, isAnonymous. Increments User.stats.posts (+1) via $inc. Async (non-blocking): DNAMatchAlgo.recordInteraction(userId, post, 'post'), PulseScore.getOrCreate(userId).then(ps=>{ps.recordAction('post'); if(media.length>0) ps.recordAction('media_post'); ps.save()}). Populates author: 'username name avatar profile isVerified'. Masks if isAnonymous=true: {_id:null, username:'anonymous', name:'Anonymous', avatar:null, profile:{avatar:null}, isVerified:false}. Response 201 {success:true, data:Post}. Errors: 500.

getPost: GET /api/v1/posts/:postId. Checks post.isActive==true (404 if false). Visibility: if visibility=='private' && !isOwner → 404. If visibility=='followers' && !isOwner && !isFollowing → 404. Increments post.stats.views atomically via $inc. Populates author+originalPost. Batch queries: Like.isLikedBy(userId,'post',postId), Like.getLikeCount('post',postId), Bookmark.findOne({user:userId,itemId:postId,itemType:'post'}).lean(). Masks anonymous. Response 200 {success:true, data:{...post, isLiked, likesCount, isBookmarked}}. Errors: 404.

getUserPosts: GET /api/v1/posts/user/:username?page=1..50&limit=1..50. Finds User {username}. Checks isOwnProfile=currentUserId==user._id. Query {author:user._id, isActive:true, isAnonymous:false if !isOwnProfile}. Sorts {isPinned:-1, createdAt:-1}. Populates author. Pagination skip=(page-1)*limit, hasMore=posts.length===limit. Response 200 {success:true, data:Post[], pagination:{page,limit,hasMore}}. Errors: 404 if user not found.

getMyPosts: GET /api/v1/posts/me?page=1..50&limit=1..50. Query {author:req.user.userId, isActive:true} (NO isAnonymous filter, owner sees own anon posts). Sorts {isPinned:-1, createdAt:-1}. Response 200 {success:true, data:Post[], pagination}.

toggleLike: POST /api/v1/posts/:postId/like. Atomic Like.toggleLike(userId,'post',postId) returns {liked, likeCount}. Syncs post.stats.likes via $set. If liked=true: async UserBehavior.recordLike(userId,post), UserEngagement.recordSignal(userId,authorId,'likes',1), feedbackService.recordEngagement(userId,{item:post,contentType:'post',action:'like'}), DNAMatchAlgo.recordInteraction(userId,post,'like'), PulseScore.recordAction('like_given'/'like_received'), Notification{recipient:authorId, sender:userId, type:'like', post:postId, message:'liked your post'}. Response 200 {success:true, data:{isLiked, likeCount}}. Errors: 404.

addComment: POST /api/v1/posts/:postId/comments, body {content, parentCommentId, gif}. Checks post.allowComments==true (403 if false). Validates content?.trim()||gif?.url (400 if both falsy). Creates Comment {post:postId, author:userId, content:content?.trim()||'', gif:gif||null, parentComment:parentCommentId||null}. Increments post.stats.comments via $inc. If parentCommentId, pushes comment._id to parent.replies. Populates author:'username name avatar profile isVerified'. Async if !selfComment: Notification{recipient:post.authorId, sender:userId, type:'comment', post:postId, comment:commentId, message:'commented on your post'}. Response 201 {success:true, data:Comment}. Errors: 404, 403, 400.

getComments: GET /api/v1/posts/:postId/comments?sort=recent|top&page=1..100&limit=1..50. Finds {post:postId, parentComment:null, isActive:true}, sorts {createdAt:-1}, populates author+replies (recursive via populateNestedReplies). Collects all IDs (root+nested). Batch: Like.getBatchLikeCounts('comment',ids)→Map, Like.getLikedIds(userId,'comment',ids)→Set. Adds likesCount, isLikedByMe to each (recursive). Deletes legacy likes[]. If sort=='top', re-sorts root by likesCount DESC. Response 200 {success:true, data:Comment[], pagination}.

toggleCommentLike: POST /api/v1/comments/:commentId/like. Atomic Like.toggleLike(userId,'comment',commentId). Response 200 {success:true, data:{isLiked, likesCount}}. Errors: 404.

deletePost: DELETE /api/v1/posts/:postId. Auth: post.author.toString()===req.user.userId.toString() (403 if no). Sets post.isActive=false (soft delete). Decrements User.stats.posts (-1) via $inc. Response 200 {success:true, message:'Post deleted successfully'}. Errors: 404, 403.

updatePost: PATCH /api/v1/posts/:postId, body {text, visibility, allowComments}. Auth check (403 if post.author!=userId). Updates post.content.text, post.visibility, post.allowComments. Sets post.isEdited=true, post.editedAt=new Date(). Masks anonymous. Response 200 {success:true, data:Post}. Errors: 404, 403.

searchPosts: GET /api/v1/posts/search?q=query&page=1..20&limit=1..50. Uses MongoDB $text (indexed, not regex): {$text:{$search:q}, isActive:true, isAnonymous:false, visibility:'public'}, sorts by textScore. Returns [] if q empty. Populates author. Response 200 {success:true, data:Post[], pagination}.

getTrendingHashtags: GET /api/v1/posts/trending/hashtags. cacheService.getOrSet('trending:hashtags', ()=>computeTrendingHashtags(), TTL=env.TRENDING_HASHTAG_TTL_SEC||600s). Single-flight. Response 200 {success:true, data:[{tag,count}]}.

computeTrendingHashtags: Aggregation on Post collection, last 24h: $match {isActive:true, visibility:'public', createdAt:{$gte:Date.now()-86400000}}, $unwind '$content.hashtags', $group {_id:'$content.hashtags', count:{$sum:1}}, $sort {count:-1}, $limit 10. Returns [{tag:_id, count}].

files.purpose: HTTP handlers for personalized feeds (home, following, for-you, global, trending, nearby) with algorithm-driven ranking and candidate caching
files.details:
Constants: MAX_PAGE=50, CANDIDATE_TTL=env.FEED_CANDIDATE_TTL_SEC||30s, FOLLOW_GRAPH_TTL=env.FOLLOW_GRAPH_TTL_SEC||60s. getFollowGraph(userId): cacheService.getOrSet('followgraph:{userId}', async()=>{followingIds=Follow.getFollowingIds(userId), followerIds=Follow.getFollowerIds(userId), friendIds=intersection, return {followingIds:String[], friendIds:String[]}}, TTL). processPosts(posts, userId): Batch Like.getLikedIds(userId,'post',postIds). For each: masks anonymous, ensures stats.likes exists, returns {post, isLiked, _score:undefined}.

getHomeFeed: GET /api/v1/feed/home?page=1..50&limit=1..50&vibe=auto. Fetches followGraph. Bounded candidate: Post.find({isActive:true, $or:[{visibility:'public'}, {visibility:'followers', author:{$in:[...followingIds, userId]}}]}).sort({createdAt:-1}).limit(min(limit*5,100)).populate('author','username name avatar profile isVerified stats'). Ranks via feedAlgo.rankPostsWithVibe(posts, userId, {followingIds, friendIds, includeVelocity:true, vibe}). In-memory pagination. Processes. Response 200 {success:true, data:Post[], pagination:{page, limit, hasMore}, vibe}.

getFollowingFeed: GET /api/v1/feed/following?page=1..50&limit=1..50&before=ISO8601. Keyset pagination on createdAt. Query {author:{$in:followingIds}, isActive:true, visibility:{$in:['public','followers']}}. If before (valid date), adds createdAt:{$lt:before}. Fetches limit+1 to compute hasMore. Sets nextCursor. Response 200 {success:true, data:Post[], pagination:{page, limit, hasMore, nextCursor, feedType:'following'}}.

getForYouFeed: GET /api/v1/feed/foryou?page=1..50&limit=1..50. getForYouCandidates(userId): (1) fresh=getCandidateSet('foryou'), (2) userVec=userVectorService.getUserVector(userId, {Like, Post, SocialDNA, UserBehavior}), (3) if userVec, retrieved=vectorRetrievalService.retrieveCandidates({Post, userVec, filter:{author:{$ne:userId}}, limit:RETRIEVE_LIMIT}), (4) merge retrieved+fresh deduped, (5) on error, return fresh. Ranks via feedAlgo.getForYouFeed(userId, posts, {followingIds, includeVelocity:true}). Processes. Response 200 {success:true, data:Post[], pagination:{page, limit, hasMore, feedType:'foryou'}}.

getGlobalFeed: GET /api/v1/feed/global?page=1..50&limit=1..50. getCandidateSet('global'): cacheService.getOrSet('feed:candidate:global', async()=>Post.find({isActive:true, visibility:'public'}).sort({createdAt:-1}).limit(200).populate('author','...stats').lean(), CANDIDATE_TTL). Ranks via feedAlgo.rankPosts(posts, userId, {followingIds, friendIds, includeVelocity:true}). Response 200 {success:true, data:Post[], pagination}.

getTrendingPosts: GET /api/v1/feed/trending?limit=1..50&timeRange=1..168h. cacheService.getOrSet('feed:candidate:trending:{timeRange}', async()=>Post.find({isActive:true, visibility:'public', createdAt:{$gte:Date.now()-timeRange*3600000}}).sort({'stats.likes':-1}).limit(100).populate('author'), CANDIDATE_TTL). Ranks via feedAlgo.getTrendingPosts(posts, {timeRange, limit}). Response 200 {success:true, data:Post[]}.

getNearbyPosts: GET /api/v1/feed/nearby?longitude=num&latitude=num&maxDistance=1000&limit=1..50. Validates location (400 if missing). Calls Post.getNearbyPosts([longitude, latitude], Math.min(maxDistance||1000, 50000), {limit}). Geospatial query. Processes. Response 200 {success:true, data:Post[]}.

files.purpose: HTTP handlers for CRUD reels, comments, likes, views, shares with algorithm-driven ranking
files.details:
Constants: REEL_CANDIDATE_TTL=env.REEL_CANDIDATE_TTL_SEC||30s, VECTOR_DEPS={Like, Post, SocialDNA, UserBehavior}, BROKEN_DEFAULT_AVATAR='/defaults/avatar.png'. getOptimizedVideoUrl(url): if cloudinary, inserts 'f_auto,q_auto,w_720/' in upload path. normalizeUser(user): checks user.profile.avatar (skip if BROKEN_DEFAULT_AVATAR), user.avatar, user.authMethods[].profile.avatar for valid URL. Returns {_id, username, isVerified, avatar:cleanUrl||null, stats}.

createReel: POST /api/v1/reels (multipart), file (video), caption. Validates userId (401), req.file (400). Streams to cloudinary.uploader.upload_stream({folder:'reels', resource_type:'video', eager:[{width:720, crop:'limit', quality:'auto:good'}], eager_async:true}, callback). On success: creates Reel {user:userId, videoUrl:result.secure_url, publicId:result.public_id, caption:req.body.caption||'', stats:{likes:0, comments:0, shares:0, views:0, avgWatchPercentage:0}}. Response 201 {success:true, data:Reel}.

getReelsFeed: GET /api/v1/reels/feed?page=1..50&limit=1..50&type=foryou|following. Sets Cache-Control headers (no-store, no-cache). cacheService.getOrSet('reel:candidate:foryou', async()=>Reel.find({isActive:{$ne:false}}).sort({createdAt:-1}).limit(100).populate({path:'user', select:'+authMethods username profile avatar isVerified stats'}).lean(), REEL_CANDIDATE_TTL). If empty, returns 200 data:[]. Fetches getCachedFollowing(userId). Batch Like.getLikedIds(userId,'reel',reelIds). If type!='following' && userId, attempts userVectorService.getUserVector(userId, VECTOR_DEPS), ranks by cosine similarity, falls back on error. Applies ranking: if type=='following', ReelAlgo.getFollowingFeed(userId, reels, followingIds), else ReelAlgo.getForYouFeed(userId, candidateReels, {followingIds}). On error, fallback=reels. Processes: {videoUrl:optimized, isLiked, likesCount:stats.likes??likesCount??0, user:normalized}. Response 200 {success:true, data:Reel[], pagination:{page, limit, hasMore, feedType}}.

toggleLike: POST /api/v1/reels/:reelId/like. Atomic Like.toggleLike(userId,'reel',reelId) returns {liked, likeCount}. If liked: async UserEngagement.recordSignal(userId, reel.user, 'likes', 1), async Notification{recipient:reel.user, sender:userId, type:'reel_like', reel:reelId, message:'liked your reel'}. Response 200 {success:true, data:{isLiked, likesCount}}. Error 404.

trackView: POST /api/v1/reels/:reelId/view, body {watchTimeSeconds, watchPercentage}. Normalizes watchPercentage (accepts 0..1 or 0..100, clamps to 0..1). If watchPercentage provided, aggregation pipeline: stats.avgWatchPercentage=(oldAvg*oldViews+frac)/(oldViews+1), stats.views+=1. Else increments stats.views. Async: UserEngagement.recordSignal(userId, reel.user, 'views', 1), if watchTimeSeconds also recordSignal(..., 'totalWatchTimeSeconds', watchTimeSeconds). Response 200 {success:true}. Error 404.

addComment: POST /api/v1/reels/:reelId/comments, body {content, type, parentCommentId}. Validates content (400). Creates ReelComment {reel:reelId, author:userId, content, type:type||'text', parentComment:parentCommentId||null}. Populates author select '+authMethods username profile avatar isVerified'. Normalizes author. Increments Reel.commentsCount via $inc. Async UserEngagement.recordSignal(userId, reel.user, 'comments', 1). Response 201 {success:true, data:Comment}.

getComments: GET /api/v1/reels/:reelId/comments?sort=best|top|new&page=1..100&limit=1..50. Finds {reel:reelId, parentComment:null}, sorts {createdAt:-1}, populates author+replies (limit:30). Fetches reel.user (opId). Ranks via CommentsAlgo.rankComments(comments, {mode:sortMode, opId, includeReplies:true}). Normalizes authors. Response 200 {success:true, data:Comment[]}.

toggleCommentLike: POST /api/v1/comments/:commentId/like. Atomic Like.toggleLike(userId,'comment',commentId) on ReelComment. Response 200 {success:true, data:{isLiked, likesCount}}. Error 404.

shareReel: POST /api/v1/reels/:reelId/share. Increments Reel.stats.shares via $inc. Async UserEngagement.recordSignal(userId, reel.user, 'shares', 1). Response 200 {success:true}. Error 404.

files.purpose: HTTP handlers for ephemeral snaps (stories/direct DMs) with expiration, views, reactions
files.details:
Constant: MAX_VIEWERS=500 (cap on inline viewers array; viewCount always accurate). createSnap: POST /api/v1/snaps (multipart), file (image or video), audience ('story'|'direct'), recipients (JSON if direct), caption (max 280), durationMs (1000..15000ms, default 5000). Validates userId (auth), req.file (400). Parses audience, if 'direct' parses recipients JSON, filters ObjectIds, requires length>0 (400 if none). Detects isVideo from mimetype. Streams to cloudinary.uploader.upload_stream({folder:'snaps', resource_type:isVideo?'video':'image', transformation:[{width:isVideo?720:1080, crop:'limit', quality:'auto:good'}]}, callback). On success: creates Snap {user:userId, audience, recipients:[], mediaType, mediaUrl, publicId, thumbnailUrl, durationMs, caption:caption.slice(0,280), expiresAt:Snap.defaultExpiry(), viewers:[], viewCount:0, reactions:{}}. Response 201 {success:true, data:Snap}. Errors: 400 if no file or direct without recipients, 500.

getStoryRail: GET /api/v1/snaps/rail. Fetches Follow.getFollowingIds(userId). Calls Snap.getStoryRail(userId, followingIds). Returns grouped rings. Response 200 {success:true, data:rings[]}.

getDirectInbox: GET /api/v1/snaps/direct. Calls Snap.getDirectInbox(req.user.userId). Response 200 {success:true, data:snaps[]}.

viewSnap: POST /api/v1/snaps/:snapId/view. Validates snapId via mongoose.isValidObjectId() (400). Fetches snap: select 'audience user recipients viewers viewCount'. If audience=='direct', checks auth: String(snap.user)==String(userId) || snap.recipients.some(r=>String(r)==String(userId)) (403). Idempotent: checks if userId already in viewers. If not && userId!=snap.user, atomically updates: $push:{viewers:{$each:[{user:userId, viewedAt:new Date()}], $slice:-MAX_VIEWERS}}, $inc:{viewCount:1}. Response 200 {success:true}. Errors: 400 if invalid snapId, 404 if snap not found, 403 if not authorized.

reactSnap: POST /api/v1/snaps/:snapId/react, body {reaction (emoji/token, max 8)}. Validates snapId (400). If reaction, updates {$set:{['reactions.{userId}']:reaction}}, else removes {$unset:{['reactions.{userId}']:''}}.  findByIdAndUpdate. Response 200 {success:true, data:{reaction}}. Errors: 400 if invalid snapId, 404.

getViewers: GET /api/v1/snaps/:snapId/viewers. Fetches snap: select 'user viewCount viewers'. Checks auth: String(snap.user)==String(req.user.userId) (403). Populates viewers.user select 'username name avatar profile.avatar isVerified'. Returns {viewCount, viewers:[]}.user objects. Response 200 {success:true, data}. Errors: 404 if snap not found, 403 if not author.

deleteSnap: DELETE /api/v1/snaps/:snapId. Finds snap {_id:snapId, user:req.user.userId} (404 if not found/unauthorized).
